heading: Duty of United States attorney to enforce law
label: 242 Duty of United States attorney to enforce law
text: It shall be the duty of each United States attorney, to whom satisfactory evidence of any violation of sections 237 to 242 of this title is presented, to cause appropriate proceedings to be commenced and prosecuted in the United States court having jurisdiction of such offense.
notes: Change of NameAct , eff. , substituted “United States attorney” for “district attorney”. See , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.June 25, 1948Sept. 1, 1948section 541 of Title 28
